info.title: Pardot API
info.description: Salesforce Account Engagement (formerly Pardot) REST API v5 for marketing automation including prospect management, email campaigns, lists, forms, visitor tracking, and data exports.

post.summary: Add a prospect to a list

delete.summary: Remove a prospect from a list

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
